title: 19 Days
synopsis: The mischievous Jian Yi and the level-headed Zhan Zhengxi have been best friends since early childhood. Now, as they are entangled in the follies of high school, their bond has deepened. Jian Yi all but hides his romantic feelings for Zhan Zhengxi, who, despite pretending to dislike Jian Yi's teasing, cannot keep his true emotions from occasionally slipping through. Amid various festivals, classroom antics, and frequent shenanigans, Jian Yi and Zhan Zhengxi are soon joined by the rebellious delinquent Mo Guanshan and the handsome flirt He Tian. Together, they embrace the vibrant days of youth—always with a hint of romance.

title: Necronomico and the Cosmic Horror Show
titleEnglish: Necronomico and the Cosmic Horror Show
titleNative: ネクロノミ子のコズミックホラーショウ
synonyms: เนโครโนมิโกและการแสดงสยองขวัญแห่งจักรวาล
synopsis: We all need a chance to change our lives! The story follows Miko Kurono, who began her dream career as a livestreamer under the name "Necronomico" after graduating middle school. Amidst spending her days with childhood friend Mayu Mayusaka and rival Kanna Kagurazaka, she's introduced to a new VR game project!? Upon encountering the game, the girls start pursuing the 'irreplacable now'. (Source: Official site, translated)

title: Neko ni Naritai Tamagawa-kun
titleNative: 猫になりたい田万川くん
synopsis: For Tamagawa, volunteering at a cat café is the only relief from his stressful job. The manager tells him to, "relax and learn to be spoiled", but he doesn't know what that means until a new customer, Shindo Rai, comes to the café and tells Tamagawa he wants to keep him as a cat! Enter their strange, but fateful relationship. A pure-hearted and soothing romantic comedy. (Kodansha, translated)

title: Detective Conan: One-Eyed Flashback
titleNative: 名探偵コナン 隻眼の残像
synonyms: Detective Conan: Il flashback a un occhio solo
Detektiv Conan Film 28: Der Flashback des Einäugigen
synopsis: The 28th Detective Conan movie. When a researcher is attacked in the Yatsugatake Mountains, Nagano PD’s Kansuke Yamato and Yui Uehara investigate, but Kansuke’s old eye injury flares up — hinting at a dark connection. Meanwhile, Kogoro’s ex-colleague is murdered after looking into a past incident of Kansuke’s. Teaming up with Amuro and Kazami, Conan digs in to uncover the truth behind it all. (Source: Sony Pictures Australia)

title: Bureau of Paranormal Investigation Season 2
titleNative: 民调局异闻录 第2季
synonyms: Bai Fa Shen La (白发沈辣)
synopsis: Shen La, a special investigator of the "Poll Bureau" of the mysterious incident management agency, was seriously injured in the execution of his mission. When he was about to die, he accepted the inheritance of Wu Rendi, the director of the Sixth Office - a "seed" containing mysterious power. After regaining consciousness, Wu Rendi's senior brother Guangren accepted him as his disciple. In order to find the fragments of the Tianli Diagram, Shen La, after going through the Tianshan Wolf Tomb, energy backlash, foundation conspiracy and other incidents, was finally recognized by Wu Rendi and received the ancient artifact-the Twin Swords of Crime and Punishment given by him. At the same time, the problem of the insider in the polling bureau became more complicated and confusing, and Shen La and her partner Sun Desheng went into battle again. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Into The Mortal World
titleNative: 落凡尘

title: Page of Lambda
titleNative: Page of Lambda
synonyms: Page of Lambda オープニング映像
synopsis: Conceptualized opening movie for Nijisanji's Page of Lambda , a "what if" original anime series based around Ange Katrina, Inui Toko and Lize Helesta better known as "Sanbaka". What if their original story was made into an anime...? We imagined and created an "if" world for these girls and produced an opening animation alongside production setting materials. This is a new story for Sanbaka that transcends the boundaries between reality and fiction, let's go on a journey together to imagine and create a new side of them. (Source: Official Website, edited, translated)

title: LUPIN THE IIIRD: The Movie - The Immortal Bloodline
titleRomaji: LUPIN THE IIIRD THE MOVIE: Fujimi no Ketsuzoku
titleEnglish: LUPIN THE IIIRD: The Movie - The Immortal Bloodline
titleNative: LUPIN THE IIIRD THE MOVIE 不死身の血族
synonyms: Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: Nieśmiertelny rodowód
Lupin The IIIrd - The Movie: La Stirpe Immortale
synopsis: A special invitation has been sent to Lupin and his crew to an uncharted island. The invitee is believed to be the mastermind who controls the world's top mercenaries and is connected to crimes throughout the world! Who could this mysterious person be? The answer lies on the uncharted island hidden away from existence. To find out the identity of the mastermind and steal his vast wealth, Lupin and his crew as well as Inspector Zenigata, in his attempt to capture them, are led to this mysterious island. The island is shrouded full of mysteries including old discarded tanks and firearms along with strange and mysterious inhabitants. Supposedly the dead assassins from his past are there waiting for Lupin and his friends. (Source: POM Anime)

title: Me and the Alien MuMu
titleNative: 宇宙人ムームー
synopsis: A cat-like alien from a distant galaxy, MuMu, arrives on Earth. His goal is to learn about home appliance technology on Earth to recover the technology his species has lost. The protagonist, Sakurako, has a typical university life, but everything changes with MuMu's arrival! What begins as an unexpected cohabitation quickly turns into a whirlwind of chaotic events. The chemistry between Sakurako and MuMu leads to a super-spectacular, appliance-filled, and cat comedy adventure. (Source: Pony Canyon)
